The live map with cache pins, favorite-count badges and the right-side tool stack.
Tapping a pin shows the cache callout — name, distance, favorite count, D/T, size and GC code.
The dropped-pin menu — create an offline geocache, save the location, navigate, or copy coordinates.
The Map Types panel with the Pro Offline Maps download and Apple & Google styles.
Saved Locations under More — each row keeps a named spot with its coordinates.
